title: Child Development Mission and Vision
content:
Child Development Mission and Vision

Vision

To be a leading department that contributes to science and social development with a multidisciplinary approach by conducting evidence-based scientific research and applied studies in the field of Child Development, adopts a rights-based understanding, is willing to learn, and takes a leading role in the national and international arena.

Mission

To train well-equipped child development experts who are sensitive to cultural diversity and differences, who adopt an egalitarian and holistic approach in line with global needs, who will guide evidence-based policies and conduct applied studies for the benefit of society.
